params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include in the response.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict returned resources.

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of resources to return.

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of resources to skip before returning results.

params.name: expandSubcollections
params.description: When set to true, expands all subcollections inline within the response.

items.docs: Returns a collection of all virtual server resources configured on the BIG-IP system.
Creates a new virtual server resource on the BIG-IP system. At minimum, a name and destination address:port must be specified.

params.name: virtualName
params.description: Name of the virtual server resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names (e.g., ~Common~my_virtual).

params.name: expandSubcollections
params.description: When set to true, expands all subcollections inline within the response.

items.docs: Returns a single virtual server resource identified by name.

params.name: virtualName
params.description: Name of the virtual server resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names (e.g., ~Common~my_virtual).

items.docs: Replaces the entire virtual server resource. All writable properties must be included in the request body.

params.name: virtualName
params.description: Name of the virtual server resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names (e.g., ~Common~my_virtual).

items.docs: Partially updates a virtual server resource. Only specified properties are modified.

params.name: virtualName
params.description: Name of the virtual server resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names (e.g., ~Common~my_virtual).

items.docs: Removes a virtual server resource from the BIG-IP system. Active connections will be terminated.

items.docs: Returns a collection of all pool resources configured on the BIG-IP system.
Creates a new pool resource on the BIG-IP system. The pool name is required; members and monitors can be specified during creation.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

params.name: expandSubcollections
params.description: When set to true, expands all subcollections inline within the response.

items.docs: Returns a single pool resource identified by name.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

items.docs: Replaces the entire pool resource configuration.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

items.docs: Partially updates a pool resource configuration.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

items.docs: Removes a pool resource from the BIG-IP system. The pool must not be referenced by any virtual server.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include in the response.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict returned resources.

items.docs: Returns a collection of all members within the specified pool.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

items.docs: Adds a new member to the specified pool. The member name must be in the format address:port (e.g., 10.0.0.1:80).

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

params.name: memberName
params.description: Name of the pool member in the format address:port (e.g., 10.0.0.1:80).

items.docs: Returns a single pool member identified by name.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

params.name: memberName
params.description: Name of the pool member in the format address:port (e.g., 10.0.0.1:80).

items.docs: Replaces the entire pool member resource configuration.

params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

params.name: memberName
params.description: Name of the pool member in the format address:port (e.g., 10.0.0.1:80).

items.docs: Partially updates a pool member resource configuration.

params.name: poolName
params.description: Name of the pool resource. Use ~Common~ prefix for partition-qualified names.

params.name: memberName
params.description: Name of the pool member in the format address:port (e.g., 10.0.0.1:80).

items.docs: Removes a member from the specified pool.

items.docs: Returns a collection of all node resources configured on the BIG-IP system.
Creates a new node resource on the BIG-IP system. The name and address are required for creation.

params.name: nodeName
params.description: Name of the node resource. Can be the IP address or a user-defined name.
